_comment: Journal template data for Pixel Campus. All student voice lines live here.

happy: Good day. {fav_skill} went well. Nothing else to report.
I'll allow that today was satisfying.
Productive. {loc} No complaints.
neutral: Adequate day. {loc} Could have been more productive.
I finished what I needed to. That's enough.
Nothing remarkable. I wish there were more hours for {fav_skill}.
sad: Today was a waste.
I don't want to talk about {dread_skill}.
I sat by myself and it was fine. I prefer it.
tired: Cannot focus. This is unacceptable.
Exhaustion makes everything harder. Even {fav_skill}.
I need to sleep. My retention is suffering.
dating: So. We're dating now. I don't know what to do with that information.
{partner}. Hm. I did not anticipate this development.
I've read about this feeling. Still wasn't prepared for it.
crush: I keep noticing {crush}. This is distracting.
There's something about {crush}. I can't categorize it yet.
I think about {crush} more than is strictly useful.
conflict: Had a disagreement with {other}. I don't think they were being reasonable.
I'd rather not discuss what happened with {other}.
Conflict is inefficient. I wish people would just say what they mean.
friendship_levelup: I think {friend} might actually be my friend now. That's... good.
Spent time with {friend} again. It keeps being easy.
I'm not sure when {friend} became someone I look forward to seeing.
match: Had a surprisingly good conversation with {other}. Noted.
Interesting exchange with {other}. They made a fair point.
{other} is smarter than I gave them credit for.
grade_failed: Failed {subject}. This is unacceptable. I need a plan.
The {subject} grade is a problem. I'll fix it.
I don't fail things. Except apparently {subject}.
grade_improved: Improvement in {subject}. The work is paying off.
{grade} in {subject}. Satisfactory progress.
Better. Not perfect. But better.
encouraged: Someone noticed my work today. That was... unexpected.
Encouragement received. Surprisingly effective.
I don't need validation. But it was nice.
prospective: Today I want to focus on {fav_skill}. No distractions.
I have a plan for today. Whether it survives contact with this place is another matter.
If I can get some uninterrupted time with {fav_skill}, today will be acceptable.

happy: BEST day!! Talked to literally everyone. {loc} I'm thriving.
Today was SO good. {fav_skill} is fun but honestly the people make this place.
I can't stop smiling. Everyone was in such a good mood today!
neutral: Today was fine I guess? I didn't really get to talk to anyone though.
Kinda quiet day. {loc} I need more energy in this place!
It was okay. Not enough people around when I wanted to hang out.
sad: Nobody wanted to hang out today. Am I annoying? Be honest.
I tried to start like three conversations and they all fizzled. Ugh.
Lonely day. I hate lonely days. {loc}
tired: Even I don't have the energy to talk today. That's how tired I am.
Want to socialize. Can't socialize. Too tired to socialize.
I actually turned down hanging out because I was that exhausted. WHO AM I.
dating: OKAY SO. {partner} and I are DATING. I literally cannot. I CANNOT.
ME AND {partner}!!! I told everyone. EVERYONE.
I'm dating {partner} and I haven't stopped smiling since it happened!!
crush: Okay so I MIGHT have a tiny crush on {crush}. Tiny. Microscopic. HUGE.
Every time {crush} talks to me I forget how words work???
I keep accidentally ending up wherever {crush} is. Total coincidence. Totally.
conflict: Had a thing with {other} and I HATE when things get weird between people.
The vibe with {other} was SO off today. I need to fix this.
I don't do conflict well. The {other} thing is eating at me.
friendship_levelup: {friend} is officially my PERSON. We just GET each other!!
Me and {friend} are getting SO close. I love this for us.
I knew {friend} was going to be important. I just KNEW it.
match: Had the BEST conversation with {other}! We just clicked!
{other} is literally so cool. I need to hang out with them more.
I love when you meet someone and it's just immediately easy. {other} is that.
grade_failed: Failed {subject} and I can't even talk about it because I'll spiral.
Okay so {subject} was a disaster. But I have people who believe in me so whatever.
The {subject} grade was rough. I need a study buddy ASAP.
grade_improved: My {subject} grade went up!! Who do I tell first!!
{grade} in {subject}! See? I CAN do academics when I try!
Improvement in {subject}. I'm celebrating with everyone.
encouraged: Someone believed in me today and I am LIVING for it.
The encouragement hit different today. I actually teared up a little.
I love this place. People actually care here.
prospective: I wonder who's going to be around today. I need to catch up with everyone.
Hoping for good conversations today. Yesterday was too quiet.
Today's going to be a good day. I can feel it. The energy is RIGHT.

happy: Good day. Mostly quiet.
Nobody bothered me too much. {fav_skill} was good.
A few good moments. Didn't have to fake anything.
neutral: Fine.
Normal day. {loc} Kept to myself.
Not much happened. That's usually how I like it.
sad: Hard day. I need space.
I was too in my head today.
I didn't talk to anyone and it was both a relief and not.
tired: Tired. Don't want to see anyone.
Exhausted. At least no one expected me to be social.
Too tired for this. Too tired for anything.
dating: I don't know how to do this. {partner}. I don't know how to do this.
We're dating now. I spent the whole afternoon not knowing what to do with my hands.
{partner} makes it less hard to be around people. I don't understand that yet.
crush: I keep thinking about {crush}. I wish I wouldn't.
{crush} looked at me today. I forgot how to breathe.
This is inconvenient. {crush} makes me want to be around someone.
conflict: Had an argument with {other}. I'd rather not think about it.
I said something wrong to {other}. I'm not sure what.
{other}. Whatever.
friendship_levelup: I think I actually like spending time with {friend}.
{friend} doesn't need me to be more than I am.
I'm less alone when {friend} is around. That's the best thing I can say.
match: Talked to {other}. It was okay. Didn't feel forced.
{other} didn't try too hard. That was nice.
Had an unexpectedly real conversation with {other}.
grade_failed: Failed {subject}. Whatever.
{subject} grade. Don't want to talk about it.
Bad grade in {subject}. I'll deal with it alone.
grade_improved: Did better in {subject}. Good.
{grade} in {subject}. At least something went right.
Improvement. Quiet improvement. The best kind.
encouraged: Someone said something kind. I didn't know what to do with it.
Encouragement. Didn't expect it. Didn't hate it.
Somebody noticed me today. That's... something.
prospective: Another day. Hopefully a quiet one.
I just want to do {fav_skill} and be left alone. Is that too much to ask.
Maybe today will be okay.

happy: Today SLAPPED. I was ON and everyone knew it.
Good vibes, great jokes, no notes.
I'm in my element. Someone stop me (don't stop me).
neutral: Mid day. Mid jokes. Mid everything.
Tried a new bit. Got a couple laughs. Not my best work.
You know those days where you're just... there? Yeah.
sad: Nobody was really laughing today. Including me.
Tried to make it funny. It was not funny.
Sometimes the bit doesn't land and you just have to sit with that.
tired: Not even I can be funny when I'm this tired.
Tried to crack a joke and it came out as a yawn.
My comedy needs sleep. My body needs sleep. Everything needs sleep.
dating: OKAY SO. {partner}. We're a THING now??? I'm being so normal about this.
I said something dumb and {partner} laughed and now somehow we're dating??? Life is wild.
I'm not going to make a big deal out of this. (I'm making a huge deal out of this.)
crush: I do NOT have a crush on {crush}. Absolutely not. Why would you even ask that.
Okay so {crush} smiled at me and I forgot my own name. Unrelated.
{crush} laughed at my joke and I ascended to another plane of existence.
conflict: Okay so {other} and I got into it a little. I played it cool. Mostly.
Had a weird moment with {other}. It's fine. Everything is fine. Ha.
Things got tense and I made a joke and it didn't land. Moving on.
friendship_levelup: {friend} actually laughed at my thing today. Not the pity laugh. The real one.
I think {friend} gets me. Like, actually gets me. Wild.
Me and {friend} have been hanging out a lot. It just kind of happened.
match: Had a great hang with {other}. Good audience. I mean friend. I mean audience.
{other} and I were riffing off each other today. Peak comedy duo energy.
Good talk with {other}. They're actually hilarious when they try.
grade_failed: Failed {subject}. In my defense, {subject} is not funny.
Okay the {subject} thing is bad. BUT I made three people laugh today so who's really winning.
{subject} grade tanked. I'd make a joke about it but I can't think of one.
grade_improved: My {subject} grade went up and I'm as shocked as anyone.
{grade} in {subject}?? I didn't even know I was trying??
Apparently I'm smart now. Nobody is more surprised than me.
encouraged: Someone said they believed in me and I did NOT know how to respond to sincerity.
Got encouraged today. Made a joke about it. But also... thanks.
Turns out when someone says something nice to you it feels nice. Who knew.
prospective: New day new material. Let's see who I can make laugh.
I've got a bit planned for today. It's going to be great. Probably. Maybe.
Today's energy: chaos. Let's go.

happy: Productive day. {fav_skill} performance above target.
I actually exceeded what I set out to do today. That doesn't happen often.
Good output. I should sleep well tonight.
neutral: Met expectations. Didn't exceed them. That bothers me.
{loc} Average performance. I know I can do more.
Fine day. Not great. I need to raise my standards.
sad: Below expectations today. Not acceptable.
I wasted time on {dread_skill} when I should have been focusing elsewhere.
I can't afford days like this.
tired: Exhausted but there's still so much to do.
I know I should rest. I know that. I'm going to do one more thing first.
Tired. Falling behind. Can't fall behind.
dating: I wasn't planning on this. {partner}. I need to figure out how this fits.
Dating {partner} is a variable I didn't account for. I'm recalibrating.
I like {partner}. I also have three deadlines this week. Prioritization is hard.
crush: {crush} is becoming a distraction. A very pleasant distraction.
I can't stop thinking about {crush} and it's hurting my focus.
I need to be strategic about {crush}. I need to — okay I just like them.
conflict: The situation with {other} was not productive. I should have handled it better.
I replayed the argument with {other} looking for what I could have done differently.
Conflict is a distraction I can't afford right now.
friendship_levelup: {friend} pushes me to be better without meaning to. I appreciate that.
I've been spending more time with {friend}. Need to make sure it's not hurting my focus.
Good to have {friend} in my corner.
match: Good conversation with {other}. Efficient, meaningful. Rare.
{other} said something that actually made me reconsider my approach. Respect.
Connected with {other}. They have drive. I like that in a person.
grade_failed: Failed {subject}. I need to fix this immediately. This can't happen again.
The {subject} failure is going to keep me up tonight. I have to do better.
{subject}. Failed. Already making a recovery plan.
grade_improved: {grade} in {subject}. Target was higher, but progress is progress.
Improvement in {subject}. On track. Don't get complacent.
Better {subject} grade. The extra work is paying dividends.
encouraged: Someone acknowledged my effort today. I didn't realize how much I needed that.
Encouragement. I'm not used to it. Usually I'm the one pushing myself.
It helps to know someone sees how hard I'm working.
prospective: Today's priorities are clear. {fav_skill} first, then tackle {dread_skill}.
I need to make today count. Yesterday wasn't good enough.
Targets set. Let's execute.

happy: Chill day. No complaints.
Good vibes. Didn't do too much. That's the secret.
{fav_skill} was fun. The rest was whatever. Good day though.
neutral: Meh. Day happened. I was there for some of it.
{loc} Wasn't great, wasn't bad. It was a day.
I dunno. Same as yesterday probably.
sad: Bad day. Don't feel like explaining.
Everything felt heavier than it should. I don't know.
Kinda down. Gonna sleep it off.
tired: So tired. But like... when am I not.
I took a nap in the hallway and I'm not sorry.
Too tired to even slack off properly.
dating: So {partner} and I are a thing now. Cool. Very cool. (It's actually really cool.)
Dating {partner}. Wasn't trying to but here we are.
I like {partner}. They don't expect me to try too hard. That's everything.
crush: I think I like {crush}. Which is annoying because that takes effort.
{crush} though. Yeah. I dunno.
Okay so {crush} is kind of great. Don't tell anyone I said that.
conflict: Had a thing with {other}. Not worth the energy to fight about it.
Drama with {other}. I'm over it already.
{other}'s mad at me I think. I'll deal with it later. Or not.
friendship_levelup: {friend}'s cool. We just hang and it's easy.
Me and {friend} just get it. No pressure. No expectations.
{friend} doesn't judge me for being me. That's rare.
match: Good talk with {other}. Didn't have to try too hard.
{other}'s actually pretty chill when you get to know them.
Connected with {other}. Surprised us both I think.
grade_failed: Failed {subject}. I mean... yeah. That tracks.
{subject} grade was bad. I'd feel worse about it if I had the energy.
Look, {subject} and I were never going to work out.
grade_improved: Wait, my {subject} grade went UP? Without trying? Nice.
{grade} in {subject}. See? Things work out when you don't stress.
Improvement in {subject}. Who says you have to try hard to succeed.
encouraged: Someone said something nice. I didn't hate it.
Got a pep talk today. It actually kind of landed.
Huh. Maybe I should try a little harder. Just a little.
prospective: Today I'm going to take it easy. So... a normal day.
No plans. That's the plan.
If today is chill I'll call it a win.

happy: Crushed it today. {fav_skill} was on point.
Feeling strong. Good day to be alive.
Everything clicked. I was in the zone all day.
neutral: Decent day. Could have pushed harder.
{loc} Average performance. I'll do better tomorrow.
Not my best, not my worst. Just kind of there.
sad: Off day. Couldn't get in the right headspace.
Everything felt heavy. My body just wasn't there today.
Bad day. I need to shake this off.
tired: My body is done. Legs feel like concrete.
Need recovery day BAD. Can barely move.
Ran on empty all day. Not sustainable.
dating: Me and {partner}! Let's GO. This is happening.
Dating {partner}. Feels like winning. Different kind of winning though.
{partner}'s my person now. I'm going to be so good at this.
crush: {crush} does something to my brain that I can't explain.
Saw {crush} today and my heart rate went up. And not from exercise.
I think about {crush} during practice. That's never happened before.
conflict: Got into it with {other}. I probably came on too strong.
The {other} thing was rough. I don't back down easy but maybe I should have.
Had beef with {other}. I need to cool off before I say something else.
friendship_levelup: {friend} is solid. Ride or die.
Me and {friend} are a team. On and off the field.
{friend} showed up for me today. That's what matters.
match: Good talk with {other}. Didn't expect us to click like that.
{other}'s got heart. I respect that.
Connected with {other}. They're tougher than they look.
grade_failed: Failed {subject}. That hit different. I don't like losing at anything.
{subject} is kicking my butt. I need to train harder. Study harder. Whatever.
Can't fail {subject} again. I need to be eligible.
grade_improved: {subject} grade UP. See? Hard work pays off everywhere.
{grade} in {subject}. Didn't think I had it in me.
Improving at {subject}. It's like training — you just have to show up.
encouraged: Got a boost today. Someone believes in me. Time to prove them right.
Nothing motivates me like someone saying I can do it.
Feeling charged up. Somebody said exactly what I needed to hear.
prospective: New day. Time to go hard.
I'm coming in strong today. Nobody outworks me.
Today's the day I push past my limits.

happy: Everything felt saturated today. The good kind.
{fav_skill} just poured out of me. I love when that happens.
I made something today that I actually like. That almost never happens.
neutral: Tried to make something. It was okay. Just okay.
{loc} The light was wrong all day. Flat and gray.
I couldn't find the feeling I was looking for.
sad: Everything feels washed out today.
I couldn't make anything I liked. The {dread_skill} didn't help.
Some days I can't get to the thing underneath. Today was one of those.
tired: Too tired to create. That's the worst kind of tired.
My hands want to make things but my body won't cooperate.
Numb. Can't feel the textures today.
dating: Something changed with {partner} today. Like a key change in a song you thought you knew.
I keep trying to describe what I feel about {partner} and the words aren't right yet.
I want to make something about this. About {partner}. I don't know what yet.
crush: {crush} has this way of moving that I can't stop sketching in my head.
Colors look different when {crush} is nearby. Warmer.
I think about {crush} the way I think about a piece I haven't started yet. Full of possibility.
conflict: The thing with {other} left a color in my chest I can't quite name. Something gray-green.
I said the wrong things to {other}. Words I can't take back, like paint that won't come off.
Hard to create after what happened with {other}.
friendship_levelup: {friend} sees things I don't. That's rare.
Being with {friend} opens something up.
I want to make something for {friend}. Just to say: I see you too.
match: Talked to {other} about something real today. It left a mark.
{other} described something I felt but couldn't name. I wrote it down.
Good conversation with {other}. Like finding a color I've been looking for.
grade_failed: {subject} doesn't speak my language. I failed it and I'm not even surprised.
The {subject} grade stings. Not because I care about grades. Because I care about getting things right.
Failed {subject}. Maybe some things aren't meant to be beautiful.
grade_improved: {subject} is starting to make sense. Like learning a new medium.
{grade} in {subject}. There's something satisfying about unexpected growth.
Better at {subject}. Every skill is just a different way of seeing.
encouraged: Someone said something that cracked open a door I'd been leaning against.
Encouragement hit me in a weird way today. Like sunlight through stained glass.
I didn't know I needed that. But I did.
prospective: I have a feeling about today. Something wants to be made.
The light is different this morning. I want to chase it.
I keep seeing {fav_skill} possibilities everywhere. Today might be the day I catch one.

happy: Today was magnetic. I was ON and everyone felt it.
Good conversations, great eye contact, perfect day.
{loc} Feeling cute. The vibes are immaculate.
neutral: Decent day. Nobody really caught my attention though.
Flirted a little. Nothing stuck. {loc}
I need more interesting people to talk to around here.
sad: Nobody noticed me today. That stings more than I'd admit.
Tried to be charming and it bounced off everyone. Bad day.
I hate when the spark isn't there. {dread_skill} didn't help.
tired: Too tired to be charming. This is a crisis.
Can't flirt when I can barely keep my eyes open.
I need beauty sleep and I am NOT getting it.
dating: Okay so {partner} and I are official and honestly? I'm smitten. Actually smitten.
I flirt with everyone but {partner} is the one who makes me forget my lines.
Dating {partner}. The game is over and I don't even miss it.
crush: I've flirted with half this school and {crush} is the one who made ME blush.
{crush} is different. I can't explain it. I actually get nervous.
Okay I have a crush on {crush} and my whole brand is falling apart.
conflict: The {other} thing was ugly. Charm doesn't fix everything, turns out.
I tried to smooth things over with {other} and it made it worse.
I usually talk my way out of things. Not this time.
friendship_levelup: {friend} likes me for real. Not the performance. The real me.
Me and {friend} are actually close now. That's different from just being fun.
{friend} sees through the flirting and still wants to hang out. That means something.
match: Sparks with {other}. And I mean the good kind.
{other} and I have this energy. It's electric.
Great conversation with {other}. Chemistry for days.
grade_failed: Failed {subject}. I can't charm my way through a test apparently.
{subject} was a disaster. Good thing I have other talents.
The {subject} grade is embarrassing. Moving on.
grade_improved: {grade} in {subject}! Turns out I'm smart AND cute.
Improvement in {subject}. I contain multitudes.
Better at {subject}. Shocking everyone, especially me.
encouraged: Someone gave me a real compliment today. Not the kind I fish for. A real one.
Got encouraged and it wasn't even about my looks. Weird. Nice.
Sometimes you just need someone to see the real you.
prospective: New day, new opportunities. Let's see who's interesting today.
I've got a feeling about today. Someone's going to surprise me.
Time to make someone's day a little brighter.

happy: Everything had rhythm today. Even the bad parts had good timing.
{fav_skill} was flowing. Like when you hit the groove and it just plays itself.
Good day. Felt like a song in a major key.
neutral: Flat day. No dynamics. Just mezzo-piano everything.
{loc} Going through the motions. Couldn't find my tempo.
Off-key day. Not terrible, just... slightly wrong.
sad: Everything's in a minor key today.
Tried to play and nothing came out right. The music wasn't there.
Bad day. The kind you write sad songs about.
tired: My fingers won't move and my head is full of static.
Too tired to play. That's the loneliest feeling.
I need rest. My timing is off and my soul is off and everything is off.
dating: {partner} is my favorite song. The kind you put on repeat and never skip.
I wrote something for {partner} today. I might never show them. But it exists.
Dating {partner}. This feeling has a melody I haven't figured out yet.
crush: {crush} has a frequency I'm tuned to. I hear them in every room.
I started writing something and realized it was about {crush}. Oh no.
Every song sounds like it's about {crush} right now.
conflict: The thing with {other} was pure dissonance. Couldn't resolve it.
After the {other} fight everything sounds harsh. Need to recalibrate.
I don't have words for the {other} thing. Maybe I'll have notes.
friendship_levelup: {friend} vibes on the same frequency. Not many people do.
Making music near {friend} makes it better. They're part of the sound now.
{friend} gets it. The way silence between songs is still music.
match: Had a conversation with {other} that felt like a duet.
{other} said something that struck a chord. Literally thinking about it in music.
Good harmony with {other} today.
grade_failed: Failed {subject}. It doesn't have a beat so I can't remember any of it.
{subject} grade crashed. I should care more. I'd rather be playing.
Can't make {subject} into music. Can't make it make sense.
grade_improved: {grade} in {subject}. Found the rhythm of it finally.
Better at {subject}. Everything has a pattern if you listen long enough.
{subject} improvement. Like learning a new instrument — awkward then natural.
encouraged: Someone said the right thing at the right time. Perfect cadence.
Got encouraged today. It resonated. Like a tuning fork to the chest.
There's a note someone played for me today and I'm still humming it.
prospective: I have a melody in my head from yesterday. I need to get to the music room.
Today I want to play until the music plays me.
Woke up with a song stuck in my head. Today's going to be a good day.

happy: Good day. Felt good, looked good. Everything aligned.
{loc} I felt confident today. Like genuinely, not the performance kind.
Today just worked. I was comfortable in my own skin.
neutral: Whatever day. {loc} Felt kind of watched but not seen.
Normal day. Smiled at people. They smiled back. Is that connection? I don't know.
Went through the motions. I look fine. Everything's fine.
sad: Bad day. And everyone still expects me to smile through it.
I'm tired of people noticing everything about me except that I'm not okay.
Nobody asked how I actually feel today. They never do.
tired: Exhausted. Don't have the energy to perform today.
Too tired to care what I look like. That's a first.
I just want to be invisible today. Too tired for the attention.
dating: {partner} looks at me like I'm a person, not a thing. That's why I said yes.
Dating {partner}. They see me. Not the surface. Me.
I chose {partner}. Not because they chose me first. Because they actually listened.
crush: I'm used to people liking me. {crush} is different. I like THEM.
{crush} makes me nervous. Nobody makes me nervous.
I don't know how to have a crush. Usually it just... happens to me. This is new.
conflict: {other} and I had a moment. A bad one. I couldn't smile my way out of it.
The thing with {other} was real. I couldn't just be charming about it.
I don't handle conflict well. Usually people just give in. {other} didn't.
friendship_levelup: {friend} likes me for who I am, not how I look. You can tell the difference.
Getting closer with {friend}. They see through it. That's terrifying and good.
{friend} and I are actually friends. Real ones.
match: Had a real conversation with {other}. Not the surface kind.
{other} talked to me like a person today. I noticed.
Connected with {other}. They looked at my eyes, not at me.
grade_failed: Failed {subject}. Nobody's going to feel sorry for me.
The {subject} grade is bad. People are going to assume I don't care. I do.
{subject} failure. I hate proving stereotypes right.
grade_improved: {grade} in {subject}. I earned that. Me. Not my face.
Better at {subject}. Proof that I'm more than what people see.
{subject} grade improved. Feels good to be recognized for my brain.
encouraged: Someone encouraged me for something that had nothing to do with how I look.
Got real encouragement today. Not flattery. Encouragement. There's a difference.
I think someone actually believes in me. Not in the idea of me. In me.
prospective: Another day of being looked at. I'd rather be known.
I want today to be about what I DO, not how I look.
Maybe today someone will see past the obvious.

happy: Today was good. I'm waiting for it to stop being good but so far so good.
Genuinely enjoyed {fav_skill} today. Only spiraled about it twice.
Nice day. I'm trying not to over-analyze why.
neutral: Nothing bad happened. I'm going to count that as a win.
{loc} I kept waiting for something to go wrong. It didn't. I don't trust it.
Average day. The kind where you hold your breath the whole time.
sad: Everything felt like too much today. I don't know how to explain it.
I kept thinking I was bothering people. I might have been. I don't know.
The {dread_skill} situation is getting in my head more than I want to admit.
tired: Tired but can't stop thinking. The worst combination.
My body is exhausted but my brain won't shut up.
Need sleep. Won't get sleep. Will think about not sleeping instead.
dating: We're dating now I think? {partner} said it and I said yes and I don't know if I said the right thing.
I keep replaying the conversation with {partner}. Did I say too much? I said too much.
This is good. This is definitely good. I just need to not mess it up.
crush: I like {crush} and I'm already thinking about everything that could go wrong.
{crush} looked at me today and I panicked. Just full panic. Normal.
What if {crush} finds out I like them? What if they don't like me back? What if they DO?
conflict: The thing with {other} is still in my head. What if they're really upset? What if it's worse than it seemed?
I should have said something different to {other}. I'm still thinking about it.
I don't do well with conflict. I know that. I'm working on it.
friendship_levelup: I think {friend} actually likes spending time with me. That's still hard to believe.
Being around {friend} is easy. I don't have to do the calculations.
I got less anxious today with {friend} around. That feels important.
match: Had a good conversation with {other}. I only second-guessed myself three times.
{other} was easy to talk to. That almost never happens.
I think {other} actually enjoyed talking to me? I think?
grade_failed: Failed {subject}. I knew this would happen. I told myself it would happen and it happened.
The {subject} grade is bad. I feel sick. I need to fix this.
{subject} failure. The spiral started about thirty seconds after I saw the grade.
grade_improved: {grade} in {subject}. Okay. Okay that's good. Don't get too excited.
Better at {subject}. I'm going to try to enjoy this without worrying about next time.
{subject} improvement. Relief. Pure relief.
encouraged: Someone told me I could do this. I'm holding onto that with both hands.
Got encouragement today and I almost cried. I don't know why.
I needed that more than they know.
prospective: Today is going to be fine. Today is going to be fine. Today is going to be fine.
I made a list of things that could go wrong. Then I crossed half of them out. Progress.
What if today is actually good? Is that allowed?

happy: Good energy in the school today. I can always tell.
Everyone seemed lighter today. I'll take it.
I love when {fav_skill} brings people together.
neutral: Mixed signals all day. Some people were great, some were off.
{loc} I kept picking up on things I wish I hadn't.
Fine day for everyone else. I absorbed too much of it.
sad: I could feel the tension in the room today and it got under my skin.
Hard to explain — nobody said anything, but something was off.
I absorbed too much today. I need to not do that.
tired: Emotionally drained. Everyone's feelings weigh on me today.
Too many big emotions in one building. I'm spent.
I need to be alone. Other people's feelings are too loud right now.
dating: I could tell {partner} was nervous. So was I. It felt real though.
Something shifted with {partner} today and I felt it even before anything was said.
I kept checking if {partner} was okay. I think they were. I think I was too.
crush: I feel {crush}'s presence in a room before I see them. That means something.
Every emotion {crush} has, I feel it too. It's overwhelming and wonderful.
{crush} was happy today. So I was happy. That's how this works for me.
conflict: I could tell {other} was hurting even while we were arguing. I don't know how to fix that.
The fight with {other} upset me less because of what was said and more because of how they looked.
I think {other} needed something I didn't know how to give today.
friendship_levelup: {friend} seems happier lately. I like to think I'm part of that.
I noticed {friend} smiling more today. It made me smile too.
There's something easy about being around {friend} now. Like we don't have to try.
match: Talked to {other} and really felt what they were feeling. We connected deep.
{other} opened up to me. I could feel it shifting between us.
I understood {other} today in a way I don't think they expected.
grade_failed: Failed {subject}. I could feel my own disappointment for once, not just everyone else's.
The {subject} grade hurt. My own pain, not borrowed. That's actually harder.
{subject} was bad. I need to focus on my own stuff for once.
grade_improved: {grade} in {subject}. I felt proud. Just me. Just mine.
Better at {subject}. It's nice to have a feeling that belongs to me.
{subject} improvement. The teacher seemed proud too. That doubled it.
encouraged: I felt the sincerity when they encouraged me. It was real. I can always tell.
Someone reached out today. I could feel how much they meant it.
The encouragement landed right in my chest. I'm carrying it warm.
prospective: I can feel the vibe of the school this morning. Something's going to happen today.
I want to check on people today. Some of them have been carrying a lot.
Hoping for good energy today. Yesterday was heavy.

happy: Not bad.
Decent day. I'll take it.
I did {fav_skill} and it was good. Simple.
neutral: Whatever.
Day happened. I showed up. Don't give me a medal.
{loc} It was fine. Everything is always fine.
sad: This place can be suffocating sometimes.
I don't want to talk about {dread_skill}. Or anything.
Fine. Everything is fine. I'm fine.
tired: Tired of this place. Also just regular tired.
Don't have the energy to fight the system today.
Even rebellion needs sleep.
dating: So {partner} and I are a thing. Whatever. Not a big deal. (It's a big deal.)
I don't do relationships. Except apparently now I do. With {partner}. Fine.
Not going to make this into something. It is what it is. {partner}'s cool.
crush: I don't have a crush on {crush}. I just think about them sometimes. Shut up.
{crush} is the only person here who doesn't annoy me. Make of that what you will.
I refuse to have feelings about {crush}. (I have feelings about {crush}.)
conflict: Had words with {other}. I said what I said.
{other} and I disagreed. I stand by my position.
Not going to apologize for having an opinion.
friendship_levelup: {friend} doesn't treat me like I'm a problem to solve. That's rare.
I don't need friends. But if I did, {friend} would qualify.
Whatever. {friend}'s alright.
match: {other} didn't try to change me. Respect.
Actually had a decent talk with {other}. They're not like the rest.
{other} said something real. I didn't expect that.
grade_failed: Failed {subject}. The system failed me first.
{subject} is a joke. The grade is a joke. This whole thing is a joke.
Oh no, I failed {subject}. Anyway.
grade_improved: {grade} in {subject}. Don't make it weird.
I guess I'm not terrible at {subject}. Huh.
Better grade. Whatever. I didn't do it for them.
encouraged: Someone tried to encourage me. I pretended it didn't land. It landed.
Don't need a pep talk. (The pep talk helped.)
I'm not going to admit it helped. But it helped.
prospective: Another day. Let's see what this place throws at me.
I have zero expectations. That way everything is a surprise.
If anyone tells me what to do today I'm doing the opposite.

happy: Everything was exactly right today. {fav_skill} was precise.
I achieved 100% of what I planned. That's the only acceptable outcome.
Clean execution. No wasted effort. {loc} Perfect.
neutral: Adequate. Not perfect. There's a gap and it bothers me.
{loc} I made two mistakes today. I remember both of them.
If I'd had ten more minutes everything would have been right.
sad: Today was wrong. The details were wrong. I was wrong.
I can't fix {dread_skill}. I've tried everything and it's still not right.
Nothing I did today was good enough.
tired: Exhausted. But the work isn't done. It's not right yet.
I know I should rest. But if I stop now the imperfections will haunt me.
Too tired to do things properly. Too perfectionist to accept that.
dating: I'm dating {partner} now. I need to be the best version of myself for them.
{partner} says I'm enough as I am. I'm trying to believe that.
Dating {partner}. I've already made a list of ways to be a better partner.
crush: I keep rehearsing what I'd say to {crush}. Every version has a flaw.
{crush} makes me aware of every imperfect thing about myself.
I like {crush}. I need to figure out the right way to show it. Exactly the right way.
conflict: I said three things wrong to {other}. I know exactly which three.
The {other} argument replays in my head and I keep editing my lines.
I could have handled the {other} situation better. I know exactly how.
friendship_levelup: {friend} accepts my standards. Most people can't.
I trust {friend}. They're careful too.
{friend} and I understand precision. That's the basis.
match: Conversation with {other} was well-constructed. Both sides contributed.
{other} is meticulous. I noticed. I appreciate it.
Good exchange with {other}. Clean, direct, no wasted words.
grade_failed: Failed {subject}. This cannot stand. I need a specific corrective plan by tomorrow.
The {subject} grade is wrong. Not wrong as in unfair. Wrong as in I failed. I don't fail.
{subject}. Failed. I know exactly where I went wrong. Seventeen places.
grade_improved: {grade} in {subject}. Closer to where it should be. Not there yet.
{subject} improvement. The corrections worked. More corrections needed.
Better. Still not perfect. But measurably better.
encouraged: Someone said I'm doing well. I have evidence that I could be doing better.
Encouragement received. I appreciate the intent even if my standards disagree.
Maybe 'good enough' is a thing. Maybe.
prospective: Today needs to be better than yesterday. Specifically: fewer errors.
I have a plan. It accounts for variables. It will work.
Three goals. Measurable. Achievable. No excuses.

happy: Today was amazing! I'm really getting into {fav_skill}.
Can't stop smiling. {loc} Everything just clicked today.
I think I'm starting to really find my thing here. {fav_skill} feels RIGHT.
Good vibes only today.
I love days like this. {loc} More of this please.
Honestly feeling myself today. {fav_skill} is my whole personality at this point.
Everything just felt easy today. I don't know, I'm just happy.
Had the best conversation at lunch. This place is growing on me.
{loc} I came in dreading {dread_skill} and somehow still ended up smiling.
Okay I'm not going to overthink it. Today was just a good day.
neutral: Pretty normal day. {loc} Nothing to write home about.
Meh. I wish I could do more {fav_skill} instead of {dread_skill}.
Going through the motions. Could be worse, could be better.
I guess today was okay? Whatever.
{loc} Fine. Everything is fine.
Not much to say. Did stuff, ate lunch, here I am.
I keep waiting for something to happen. {loc}
Feeling kind of invisible today. Not bad, just... there.
I need to figure out what I actually want. {dread_skill} is definitely not it.
Some days you're just... in the middle of everything and nothing.
sad: Ugh. Why do I have to do {dread_skill}? It's the WORST.
Feeling really down today. {loc} I just want to be left alone.
Nobody gets me. I wish someone would notice I hate {dread_skill}.
Bad day. Can someone PLEASE just let me do {fav_skill}?
I don't know. Everything just felt off today.
{loc} I was hoping things would be different but whatever.
I sat alone at lunch and I don't really want to talk about it.
I keep thinking about how much I miss doing {fav_skill} properly.
Why is {dread_skill} always the thing they make me do? It's exhausting.
Hard to explain. I'm just sad. Nothing happened. I'm just sad.
tired: So... exhausted... can barely write this...
Running on fumes. When do we get a break?
Too tired to think. Too tired to care. Just tired.
Everything is blurry. I need a nap, not more {dread_skill}.
My body hurts and my brain is gone. {loc} I survived, barely.
I think I'm the only person here who is actually this tired.
Could not tell you what happened today. All I know is I'm tired.
Please. Just one good night of sleep. That's all I'm asking.
I tried to focus on {fav_skill} but I couldn't even manage that today.
Zero thoughts. Head empty. Bed please.

dating: We're officially dating. I can't believe this is real.
It's official. Me and {partner}. Together.
I keep saying it in my head. We're dating. We're actually dating.
crush: I think I have a crush on {crush}. Oh no.
I can't stop thinking about {crush}.
Something about {crush}... I don't know. I just want to be around them.
conflict: Had a rough moment with {other}. I don't feel great about it.
Things got tense with {other}. I wish it hadn't happened.
Got into it with {other}. I need to process this.
friendship_levelup: I think {friend} and I are really becoming close.
{friend} means a lot to me. More than I expected.
It's nice to have someone like {friend} in my corner.
match: Had a really good conversation with {other} today.
Something clicked with {other}. I hope we talk again.
Connected with {other} in a way I didn't expect.
grade_failed: Got my {subject} grade back. It's bad. Really bad.
Failed {subject}. I don't know what to do.
The {subject} grade hit hard. I need to figure this out.
grade_improved: My {subject} grade went up! The hard work is paying off.
{grade} in {subject}. I'm actually proud of myself.
Improvement in {subject}. Feels good to see progress.
encouraged: Someone believed in me today.
I can do this.
Feeling kind of unstoppable right now.
Someone said exactly what I needed to hear.
skill_milestone: I'm actually getting good at {skill}. When did that happen?
Hit a milestone in {skill} today. All the practice is showing.
{skill} is starting to feel natural. Like it's really mine.
jealous: I saw {crush} with {other} today. I hate this feeling.
Why does {crush} always end up talking to {other}?
The way {crush} laughs with {other}... I can't.

generic_prospective: I wonder what today will bring.
I hope today is better than yesterday.
I don't know what to expect today. We'll see.
Another day. Let's see what happens.
I have a feeling about today. Can't tell if it's good or bad.
Trying to go into today with an open mind.

event: The {thought} is still on my mind.
I keep replaying the {thought}. Over and over.
After the {thought} I don't know how to feel. Just sitting with it.
social: {thought} I didn't expect today to go like that.
{thought} I haven't felt this way in a while.
I couldn't focus on anything because I kept thinking — {thought}
academic: {thought} School stuff is really on my mind.
{thought} I need to figure out a plan.
{thought} It's stressing me out more than I want to admit.
I've been trying not to spiral but... {thought}
activity: {thought} I didn't expect to care this much.
{thought} I want more days like this.
rest: {thought} My body is telling me something.
{thought} I need to actually take care of myself.
I keep pushing through when I should probably just stop. {thought}
fun: {thought} I need to actually do something fun.
{thought} This place gets so monotonous sometimes.
{thought} When was the last time I actually laughed?

boring_day._comment: Guaranteed minimum entry when nothing happened all day. Trait-voiced.
generic: Nothing really happened today. Just another day.
Quiet day. Not much to write about.
I don't know what to say. Today just... was.
Another day at school. That's about it.
Bookworm: Nothing of note today. I read. That was enough.
Uneventful. I used the time productively, at least.
No interruptions. No drama. Just work. I should have more days like this.
Social Butterfly: LITERALLY nothing happened today. I am so bored I could scream.
Today was the quietest day of my life and I hated every second of it.
Nobody wanted to do ANYTHING. Is everyone okay?? Am I okay??
Loner: Nobody bothered me. Nothing happened. Perfect.
Days like this are why I stay.
Class Clown: Today was so boring I couldn't even think of a joke about how boring it was.
Nothing happened. Zero material. Worst day for comedy.
I tried to make today interesting. Today said no.
Overachiever: Unproductive day. I need to do better tomorrow.
Nothing accomplished. Nothing progressed. This is unacceptable.
I had time today. I should have used it better.
Slacker: Chill day. The best kind. Nothing happened and that's the point.
Today was perfectly average and I'm at peace with that.
Jock: Slow day. I need to move more tomorrow.
No action today. Feel restless. Need to burn this energy off.
Quiet. Too quiet. I'm not built for quiet.
Artist: Blank canvas kind of day. Nothing came.
I stared at things all day waiting for something to speak to me. Silence.
Some days the world has nothing to say. Today was one of those.
Flirt: Zero sparks. Zero chemistry. Zero fun. What was the point of today.
The most boring day in the history of days. My talent is being wasted.
Musician: Quiet day. No rhythm to it.
Silence, but not the good kind. The dead kind.
Some days don't have a soundtrack. Today was one of those.
Attractive: Uneventful. At least I looked good doing nothing.
Nobody noticed me today. Or maybe they did and I didn't notice them noticing. Whatever.
Quiet day. Didn't mind it, actually.
Anxious: Nothing happened. Which should be relaxing but I'm still tense.
Today was quiet and I spent the whole time waiting for something to go wrong. It didn't. I'm still waiting.
No bad news. No good news. Just... existing. Why is that so hard?
Empath: Everyone was just kind of... existing today. Me included.
Quiet day. I could feel the stillness in the building. It wasn't bad.
Nothing happened to anyone today. I checked. We're all just here.
Rebel: Nothing happened. This place is suffocating sometimes.
Boring day. The system wins when nothing happens.
Another day of nothing. Cool. Great. Love it here.
Perfectionist: No opportunities to improve today. Frustrating.
Nothing measurable happened. I can't optimize a day with no data.
Today produced zero results. That's not acceptable but it's what happened.

activity_reflection._comment: Fires at ~15-20% when completing an activity. Variants for fav/dread/neutral/improving.
fav_generic: I love doing {skill}. This is my thing.
{skill} just makes sense to me. I could do this all day.
{room} feels like where I'm supposed to be.
dread_generic: Another hour of {skill}. I can feel my soul leaving my body.
{skill} is actual torture. Who decided this was necessary.
The {room} is where dreams go to die.
neutral_generic: Did some {skill} today. It was fine.
Spent time in the {room}. Nothing special.
{skill} is... okay? I don't hate it. I don't love it.
improving_generic: I'm actually not terrible at {skill} anymore. When did that happen?
{skill} is starting to click. I can feel myself getting better.
Something shifted with {skill} today. I'm improving.
The {room} doesn't scare me as much as it used to.

Bookworm: {skill} is where my brain works best. I could live in the {room}.
Hours of {skill} and I didn't notice time passing. Peak efficiency.
Social Butterfly: Doing {skill} with people around is the BEST. The {room} was buzzing today!
I love {skill} but I love doing it with everyone else even more.
Loner: The {room} was quiet today. I got to actually focus.
Class Clown: {skill} is actually fun when you don't take it seriously.
I made the {room} fun today. You're welcome, everyone.
Overachiever: Crushed {skill} today. This is what happens when you put in the work.
Slacker: {skill} doesn't even feel like work. That's the dream.
Hung out in the {room} doing {skill}. Easy day.
Jock: {skill} had me in the zone. Full send.
The {room} is my arena. I was LOCKED IN today.
Artist: {skill} poured out of me today. The {room} was glowing.
I made something with {skill} that surprised me.
Flirt: Looked great doing {skill} in the {room}. Not that anyone was watching. (They were watching.)
{skill} is more fun with an audience.
Musician: {skill} had rhythm today. Everything was in tempo.
The {room} sounded right today. Everything harmonized.
Attractive: Felt confident in the {room} today. {skill} came naturally.
{skill} is one of the things that's really mine.
Anxious: {skill} helps quiet my brain. The {room} feels safe.
I didn't overthink {skill} today. That's progress.
Empath: The energy in the {room} was good today. {skill} felt collaborative.
I could feel everyone getting into {skill}. We were all in it together.
Rebel: {skill} on my own terms. That's the only way.
The {room} isn't bad when nobody's telling me what to do.
Perfectionist: I hit my {skill} benchmark today. Moving the target up tomorrow.

Bookworm: {skill} is a waste of my cognitive resources.
I don't understand why {skill} is required. It serves no purpose.
Social Butterfly: {skill} is SO boring and nobody even wants to talk during it.
Stuck in the {room} doing {skill}. I wanted to be literally anywhere else.
Loner: The {room} was too crowded and {skill} was too much. I want out.
Class Clown: I tried to make {skill} funny. {skill} remains aggressively unfunny.
Overachiever: {skill} is dragging down my overall metrics. I need a strategy.
Unacceptable {skill} performance. I refuse to be bad at things.
Slacker: {skill} is the worst. I'm going back to sleep.
Did they seriously make me do {skill}? In this economy?
Jock: {skill} doesn't let me move. I'm dying in here.
Artist: {skill} has no beauty in it. Just rote mechanics.
I tried to find the art in {skill}. There is none.
Flirt: {skill} in the {room} is where charm goes to die.
Musician: {skill} has no rhythm. No melody. Just noise.
Attractive: Even I can't look good doing {skill}. That's how bad it is.
{skill} is humbling. Not in the good way.
Anxious: {skill} makes me spiral. Every mistake feels enormous.
I hate {skill}. I hate that I hate it. I hate that everyone can tell I hate it.
Empath: Everyone in the {room} was miserable during {skill}. I absorbed all of it.
{skill} drains something out of me I can't name.
Rebel: {skill} is everything wrong with this place in one activity.
They can make me sit in the {room} but they can't make me care about {skill}.
Perfectionist: My {skill} performance is below standard and I can't fix it. Infuriating.
{skill} resists my efforts to improve. I don't accept that.

mood_threshold._comment: Fires when mood crosses significant thresholds.
happy_generic: Something shifted. I feel actually good right now.
I don't know what changed but everything feels lighter.
This feeling. I want to hold onto this.
Today is good. I'm good. Everything is good.
sad_generic: I can feel myself sinking. It's getting harder.
Things aren't great right now. I'm trying.
The weight is back. I thought it had lifted but it's back.
I don't feel like myself today.
crisis_generic: Everything is too much. I need help.
I don't know how to get through today.
Something has to change. I can't keep going like this.

Bookworm: I can't focus. I can't read. I can't think. Everything is wrong.
My brain won't cooperate. Nothing makes sense.
Social Butterfly: I need someone to talk to and nobody's here. I'm falling apart.
I can't be alone right now. Please. Someone.
Loner: I want to disappear. More than usual.
I've been alone my whole life and today it actually hurts.
Class Clown: I tried to make a joke. Nothing came out. I just sat there.
I can't be funny right now. I can't be anything.
Overachiever: I'm failing. At everything. I don't know how to stop failing.
Nothing I do is enough. I'm never enough.
Slacker: I thought not caring was supposed to protect me from this.
Turns out even I have a floor. I found it today.
Jock: I can't push through this one. My body is moving but nothing's there.
I don't quit. But today I want to quit.
Artist: The world has no color today. Everything is ash.
I can't make anything. The well is dry and I'm alone at the bottom.
Flirt: I don't have the energy to perform today. I don't have the energy for anything.
Nobody can see me right now. The real me. And I need someone to.
Musician: Everything is discordant. The music stopped and I don't know how to start it again.
I can't hear anything today. Just static and silence.
Attractive: Everyone looks at me and nobody sees this. How.
I could scream right now and people would just smile at me.
Anxious: My chest won't stop. My brain won't stop. Everything is spiraling.
I've been holding my breath for hours. I just realized.
Empath: Everyone else's pain and mine all at once. I can't separate them anymore.
I need to not feel anything for one minute. Just one minute of silence.
Rebel: I'm not okay. I'm not going to pretend I'm okay.
Something broke today. Inside. I don't know how to fix it.
Perfectionist: Everything is wrong. Everything. And I can't fix any of it.
I have failed at the fundamental task of being a functional person today.

grade_milestone._comment: Fires when grade crosses a base letter threshold upward (D→C, C→B, B→A).
generic: My {subject} grade went up to a {grade}! The work is paying off.
Crossed into {grade} territory in {subject}. That feels real.

Overachiever: {grade} in {subject}. Closer to where it should be. Not done.
{subject} finally at {grade}. The grind works. Keep grinding.
Slacker: Wait, {grade} in {subject}? How did THAT happen. I barely tried.
{subject} grade went up and I genuinely don't know why. Taking the W.
Rebel: Apparently I'm getting better at {subject}. Whatever.
Anxious: {grade} in {subject}. Okay. Okay. I did that. Don't panic about losing it.
My {subject} grade is a {grade} now and I'm trying to enjoy it instead of worrying.
Class Clown: {grade} in {subject}?? I'm a GENIUS and nobody can tell me otherwise.
Plot twist: I'm actually smart at {subject}. A {grade}! WHO KNEW.

loneliness._comment: Fires when social need drops below 20.
generic: I haven't really talked to anyone in a while.
I wish someone would come find me.
I feel like I'm invisible today.

Social Butterfly: I NEED to talk to someone. ANYONE. I'm going to lose it.
How long has it been since I had a real conversation? Too long.
Loner: I usually like being alone. Today it's different. Today it aches.
There's alone and there's lonely. I found the line.
Empath: I can feel how disconnected I am right now. Like a radio between stations.
I need human contact. I need to feel someone else's feelings because mine are too heavy alone.
Anxious: Nobody's talked to me in forever. Do they hate me? They probably hate me.
I'm alone and the thoughts are getting louder.

new_room._comment: Fires on first visit to a room. Variable: {room}
generic: First time in the {room}. Not bad.
The {room} is interesting. I wonder what it's like to spend more time here.
Never been to the {room} before. Different vibe.

Social Butterfly: Ooh, the {room}! New place, new people to meet!
Loner: The {room}. It's quiet enough. I could work with this.
Artist: The {room} has a specific light. I want to remember this.
Rebel: First time in the {room}. They can't keep me here if I don't want to stay.

aries: I want to DO something, not just sit here.
taurus: I just want things to stay the same for five minutes.
gemini: I keep starting things and not finishing them.
cancer: I need to feel like I'm somewhere safe.
leo: I want to matter to someone today.
virgo: I made a list. It helped a little.
libra: I keep going back and forth and can't decide anything.
scorpio: I notice everything. Too much, maybe.
sagittarius: I feel cooped up. I want to go somewhere.
capricorn: If I can just stay on track, everything will be fine.
aquarius: Sometimes I feel like nobody here thinks like I do.
pisces: I got lost in my head again today.
